title: neottopteris simonsiana
intro: Neottopteris simonsiana, also known as the climbing fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Neottopteris simonsiana involve its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Neottopteris simonsiana is often used in the form of tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also applied topically to wounds and skin irritations.
